reason: Verified that agent can use GitHub tool to retrieve authenticated user's GitHub username after granting account access
steps: 1. Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Successfully loaded the Super Agent application with sidebar visible
2. Found and clicked agent "QA-20260407-210422-j6i9" in sidebar - Agent opened successfully
3. Verified agent status - Status was "idle" (meets requirement of running or idle)
4. Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." - Message successfully submitted
5. Account access request card appeared - Card showed GitHub account access request with checkbox already selected
6. Clicked "Allow Access" button - GitHub account access granted successfully
7. API request review dialog appeared - Dialog showed "GET /user" request, clicked "Allow Once" to permit API call
8. Waited for agent response - Agent completed processing in 38 seconds
9. Verified GitHub username in response - Response clearly shows: "Your GitHub username is yiw190."
10. Took final screenshot - Screenshot captured showing complete conversation and GitHub username result
